\begin{document}
\examsection{Mixed}
\begin{enumerate}
% name: MC sample
\item \textit{(2 pts)}~A multiple-choice question.
  \begin{enumerate}[label=(\alph*)]
    \item \correctchoice{the right one}
    \item \wrongchoice{a distractor}
  \end{enumerate}
  \ifanswers \textcolor{keyred}{\textbf{Answer:} a} \fi
% name: TF sample
\item \textit{(1 pt)}~\textsc{T~/~F.}~A true/false item.
  \ifanswers \textcolor{keyred}{\textbf{Answer:} False} \fi
% name: Code sample
% rubric: False — gets() has no bounds check. 2 pts.
\item \textit{(2 pts)}~\textsc{Code.}~Is the following safe?
\begin{lstlisting}
gets(buf);
\end{lstlisting}
  \ifanswers \textcolor{keyred}{\textbf{Answer:} False} \fi
% name: FIB sample
% rubric: 1 pt per blank.
\item \textit{(2 pts)}~\textsc{Fill in the blank.}~Two goals: \rule[-2pt]{3cm}{0.4pt} and \rule[-2pt]{3cm}{0.4pt}.
  \ifanswers \textcolor{keyred}{\textbf{Answer:} confusion} \fi
\end{enumerate}
\end{document}
